svg.title: Rubin OS — Final Architecture
svg.desc: Five agents — PA, HV, EA, Ventures, Marketing — each with distinct voice, memory, and email account, all under a shared ROS root.
svg.text: PA templates · HV templates · EA templates
One manual step required after build
Drag existing 03_Deals/ 04_Assets/ 02_Areas/ etc. into the new HV/ folder in Finder/Explorer
14 skills total · 5 distinct voices · 3 email accounts · Notion as template source of truth
